description_text: Application: Universal Please measure your vehicle length and dimensions before purchasing Features and Benefits: Universal Lower Rear Body Bumper Lip Diffuser 3 Shark Fins Spoiler. Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Modification cutting required to fit properly. More durable and wear-resistant Dimensions& Material: Material: High quality ABS Plastic. Top Length: 13.9” /355mm. Lower Length: 12.4” /306mm. Height: 5.9” / 150mm. Color: Black Package Included: 1 x Diffuser 1 x Double Sided Tape(100% Brand New Never Used Or Installed) Shipping Information We will only ship this item to buyers by Normal Mail, please confirm your address is correct, and if you want to change the delivery address, just feel free to contact us when you purchase. Usually, we will ship the orders out and upload the tracking number within 1-2 business days(Monday to Friday from 8:30am-5:30pm) after you complete the payment. NOTE: If there is any CUSTOM DUTIES, LOCATL TAXES OR ANY OTHER IMPORTATION FEES, buyer will bear these costs. Each country has different customs tax threshold, so you need know your country's tax policy. Payment Information We will only accept PayPal payment. Please pay using PayPal ONLY within 7 days from the date of transaction be made. Secured credit card payment through PayPal. Return Policy 100% Satisfaction Guarantee, "Period" !PLEASE CONTACT us with ANY Concerns. We offer not less than 30 days for return and refund policies. If you receive the items that have any quality problems or damaged, please feel free to let us know and provide the photos, we will resend it or refund you. But we will not accept the return if the item damaged by the buyer’s operational errors.Return shipping cost is to be paid by the Buyer.
